title: hieracium jurassicum subsp. adenocalathium
intro: Hieracium jurassicum subsp. adenocalathium, also known as the Hieracium adenocalathium, is a rare and lesser-known species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation, due to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Hieracium adenocalathium are said to include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and even exhibit antimicrobial properties. However, the plant's preparations are not well-documented, and further research is needed to standardize its herbal use, typically it's prepared as a tincture or dried herb.
